pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh where the script creates the PROJECT_DIR variable and builds the docker-compose environment in it.
Verified from the generated docker-compose.yml in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly checks a container named 'build-agent'.
Verified from the generated Dockerfile in setup_task.sh which adds user 'agent'.
Verified from the generated Dockerfile in setup_task.sh which explicitly passes '-u 1000' to adduser.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic project directory at /home/ga/build-agent containing a Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml. The container named 'build-agent' is built with a non-root user 'agent' assigned UID 1000. All metadata claims regarding the project directory, container name, target user, and target UID are verified against the setup and evaluation scripts.
